title: WCCB Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 11 Stenographer, Stenographer and More Posts
short_info: Wildlife Crime Control Bureau (WCCB) Stenographer, Driver and More Posts Notification 2026 has been released on 27 April 2026 on the official website wccb.gov.in. A total of 11 vacancies have been announced through the WCCB Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 56 years for all posts. Age relaxation rules are as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree in Law, Stenographers, 12th Pass, 10th Pass, and other relevant qualifications as per post.
qualification.details: Public Prosecutor: Officers holding analogous posts or with 2-3 years in feeder grade; Bachelor's Degree in Law; 3 years experience in handling prosecution of criminal cases. Stenographer Grade-I: Stenographers holding analogous posts or with 6-10 years in feeder grade. Upper Division Clerk: Officers holding analogous posts or Lower Division Clerks with 8 years regular service in Level-2. Stenographer Grade-III: Officers holding analogous posts in Level-4; 12th pass; 80 wpm English shorthand, 40 wpm typing. Head Constable / Forest Guards: Officers holding analogous posts in Level-4 or 5 years in Level-3 as Constable; 2 years experience in intelligence/enforcement/investigation. Driver: Officers holding analogous posts; valid driving licence; 3 years driving experience; 10th pass; knowledge of motor mechanism.

salary_details.pay_scale: Pay Matrix Levels 2-10 as per 7th CPC
salary_details.details: Public Prosecutor: Level-10 (PB-3 Rs.15600-39100 GP Rs.5400 pre-revised) Stenographer Grade-I: Level-6 (PB-2 Rs.9300-34800 GP Rs.4200 pre-revised) Upper Division Clerk: Level-4 (Rs.25500-81100) Stenographer Grade-III: Level-4 (Rs.25500-81100) Head Constable / Forest Guards: Level-4 (Rs.25500-81100) Driver: Level-2 (Rs.19900-63200)

selection_process: Screening of Applications Verification of Eligibility
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for WCCB Stenographer, Driver and More Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: wccb.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 10-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for WCCB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to receive applications for the WCCB Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 10th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in WCCB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 11 vacancies announced for various posts in the Wildlife Crime Control Bureau (WCCB) under this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for WCCB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for WCCB Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the WCCB posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all the posts announced in the WCCB Recruitment 2026 is 56 years.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for WCCB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for the WCCB Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The salary for the selected candidates will be as per Pay Matrix Levels 2-10 as per the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC), with specific levels mentioned for each post.

faq.question: Q7. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Public Prosecutor post?
faq.answer: For the Public Prosecutor post, candidates must hold analogous posts or have 2-3 years in feeder grade, possess a Bachelor's Degree in Law, and have 3 years of experience in handling criminal prosecution cases.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates apply for multiple posts in WCCB Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification should be checked for specific rules regarding applying for multiple posts. Generally, candidates are advised to apply for the post they are most qualified for.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates as specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of the Wildlife Crime Control Bureau (WCCB), which is wccb.gov.in.
